title: Cannot reset my password
description: I tried to reset my password using the forgot password link but never received the email.

title: Login page shows error
description: After entering my credentials, the login page shows 'Invalid username or password' even though I am sure they are correct.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: The 2FA code sent to my phone is not being accepted by the system.

title: Request refund for duplicate charge
description: I was charged twice for the same subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate payment.

title: Payment not going through
description: My credit card payment keeps failing at checkout. I have tried multiple cards but all fail.

title: Wrong invoice amount
description: My latest invoice shows an amount different from what was quoted. Please review and correct.

title: Application crashes on startup
description: The desktop application crashes immediately after launching. Error: NullPointerException in main thread.

title: Dashboard loading very slowly
description: The main dashboard takes more than 30 seconds to load. This is affecting productivity.

title: Export to PDF not working
description: When I click export to PDF, nothing happens. The feature was working fine last week.

title: VPN connection dropping frequently
description: The company VPN disconnects every 10-15 minutes, disrupting my work from home.

title: No internet access in conference room B
description: WiFi is not available in conference room B. All devices show connected but no internet access.

title: Slow network speeds on floor 3
description: Users on floor 3 are experiencing very slow network speeds, especially in the afternoons.

title: Cannot update profile picture
description: When I try to upload a new profile picture, I get an error saying the file format is not supported.

title: Request access to finance module
description: I need access to the finance reporting module for my new role as Finance Analyst.

title: Account locked after failed login attempts
description: My account got locked after 3 failed login attempts. Please unlock it.

title: How to generate monthly report
description: I need instructions on how to generate the monthly sales report in the new system.

title: Request for new software installation
description: Please install Adobe Acrobat Pro on my workstation for document editing tasks.

title: Data not syncing between devices
description: My data does not sync between my laptop and mobile app. Changes made on one device do not appear on the other.

title: Email notifications not being received
description: I am not receiving any email notifications from the system for task assignments and updates.

title: Subscription upgrade not reflecting
description: I upgraded my plan from Basic to Pro 2 days ago and was charged, but my account still shows Basic features.

title: API rate limit exceeded error
description: Our integration is getting 429 Too Many Requests errors. We need our rate limit increased.

title: Single sign-on not working
description: SSO with our company's Active Directory stopped working after the recent update.
